days.message:
I love that I met you. Well, when we first met, I didn't really think of it as much, to be honest. Rishabh's girl. That's all you were to me really. Before I even met you at Campbell Pizza and shook your hand, I had already seen numerous photos of you from the phone of Mr. Swarankar, but I was always just like "Cool bro, hope it works out for you." Funny how today the situation has swapped completely (switcharoo?), and I bet he would have that response if I showed him pictures instead. But anyways, I didn't think of you much back then. You were just the pretty girl my friend wanted to date. Next time we met was at my housewarming, and you came with Rishabh and Sonali. That was the first time I actually talked to you, and introduced myself. "She's pretty cool and sociable," I thought. I know afterwards I ignored you and walked away, but that was because I hated myself and I'm insecure (We will get to insecurities in a later chapter :), but I did actually enjoy talking with you! I thought you were pretty as well, and not very, but slightly jealous that Rishabh had a chance to get a beautiful girlfriend like you. Also I was annoyed that Archit got your's and Sonali's numbers that night. It should have been me :((( .

At this time, I didn't really see you as a friend. Yeah she's cool, hope it works out for Rishabh, and I can't wait to make new friends in this new city I'm in. But that changed the day of Jasmeet's bday party/Santacon. I was playing drinking games at Jasmeet's and a drunk Archit and sober Rishabh pop in at like 11 pm? Archit's telling me about Manasa's friend, I forget her name and a potential date he has. Legend, btw. And Rishabh is moody? idk? and he was just asking us about you and what he should do. We were driving back from Jasmeet's to the Mission, and Rishabh said he was going to go over to your place. Aman suggested that he ask you if you wanted food and we would pick it up. Wingman, btw. He asked, you said no, and I was like "Bro who rejects Homeroom, lowkey red flag Rishabh, time to go next." We still went over to your place because you were kind enough to invite us over, but it felt so odd. Riya passing out, your place with no light. Everyone wanted to go home but Rishabh, but as his wingmen we had to pull through. I am so, so happy we did. That was the first time I actually talked to you and learned that you liked league??? You even had zyra keycaps and took us to your room to show it. I thought you were incredibly friendly, and at that point knew that I wanted to be friends with you. I think you even offered a white claw, but we were so dead and rejected it. Kind gesture tho. And then Rishabh asked you out blah blah blah, you broke his heart and all. Unforgettable night :)

Okay, end of Rishabh stuff, wow I blabber a lot. Now it's just you and me. I'm gonna skip archit's bday and how I liked how interested you were in talking to me. How you asked me to show you my Braum, and that was kind of hot tbh. And how I remember singing karaoke songs with you and Danilo at Rishabh's bday. And you were impressed that he knew Korean, and that's when I learned you were die-hard Korean stan or something. Ok enough of that, I want to talk about how I first got feelings for you to conclude this chapter. Otherwise I would be writing the whole day just about Jasmeet's bday. I always want to tell you everything, down to the minute detail.

Focus Suraj. I think my feelings of friendship started culminating for you ever since zyra keycaps day and playing league thanks to the archit bet :), but thinking back I wonder when it switched. I know I tell you it was Butter and vibing with you, and the fact that I felt so protective of you when Riya ousted you. Maybe that was all it took for me to see you romantically, but I feel like the groundwork was already laid out from our closeness in the previous months. I would still see you every now and then, and I remember I would laugh and smile, like even back to your housewarming or Kenny's. We would always just smile and laugh together. I guess that's all it takes for an initial attraction for me. Sharing the shroom chocolate really sealed the deal that day for me. You don't remember, but at the end before we left, I had half in my mouth, and you leaned into me and bit the other half off. Heart skipped a beat then. DEEPTHI, why didn't you ask me to kiss you again that day, I didn't hear you the first time :(( I then walked home, and told Archit how I think I have feelings for you now, and the story started that day.

This is just the start of your 30 days of stories, experiences, visuals, love, and more. Today was just reminiscing to be honest, but I hope we learn more about each other as the days go on. I love you.

days.poem: Roses are red, violets are blue, let me come on you
